query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost AS current_db_cost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerName,
  s.supplierName,
  sba.billingItemExternalId AS current_match,
  sba.assignmentMethod
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE s.supplierName LIKE '%Channel%' OR s.supplierName LIKE '%ECN%'
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 20;

FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE s.supplierName LIKE '%Channel%' OR s.supplierName LIKE '%ECN%'
